ItacPersonItem.Notes: Student of law, poet and writer, he was member of the Accademia Fiorentina, and Accademia della Crusca, with the nickname l`Imbucato. See Mirto, Lucas Holstenius... Carteggio (Florence, 1994).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
